summary: Executed V0.8 Docs Archon Upgrade. Detailed concrete YAML DAG examples (e.g., feature-development, assist) and provided explicit Git/CLI command examples for Dual-Tiered Sync Team Collaboration, elevating the documentation to Archon-grade standards.
